context: Spotify's 2020 Wrapped for India showed Bollywood soundtracks remaining dominant as COVID-19 lockdowns drove unprecedented streaming growth. Arijit Singh appeared on multiple top 10 tracks, cementing his decade-long reign. Only two international tracks — Trevor Daniel's 'Falling' and The Weeknd's 'Blinding Lights' — broke into the Bollywood-dominated top 10.

tracks.title: Illegal Weapon 2.0
tracks.artist: Garry Sandhu & Jasmine Sandlas (from Street Dancer 3D)

tracks.title: Tu Hi Yaar Mera
tracks.artist: Arijit Singh & Neha Kakkar (from Pati Patni Aur Woh)
